CEN Response Viewer

Response 220034844

Semiconductor Educator Fellowship

Community Engagement (CE) - partner provides funding or sponsorship tied to shared activity outcomes.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

Semiconductor Educator Fellowship - Intel funded program. Included 44 educators across Arizona High Schools to learn about the Semiconductor industry and create plans to embed semiconductor exploration related content into their courses and curriculum, from CTE to general education topics.

Question

Activity Start Date / End Date

Start Date

2025-07-01 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

End Date

2026-06-30 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

Question

Public Service or Community Engagement

Community Engagement (CE) - partner provides funding or sponsorship tied to shared activity outcomes.

People And Units

Question

Units

  • Ira A. Fulton Schools of Engineering - Global Outreach and Extended Education (GOEE)
  • ASU Foundation

Question

Programs/Initiatives

No formal program or initiative explicitly identified in this survey response.

Question

Faculty/Staff

  • Brittany Holmes (Associate Director, Professional Programs and Workforce Development) - brittany.a.holmes@asu.edu
  • Additional ASU collaborators from survey: ASU Prep, ECEE and SEMTE faculty, ASU Foundation
  • ASU Institutional Relationship Manager: Dario Solis
